mrt_rescue_shim.py.role: rescue single-shot shim; CONTAINS synthetic-fallback (unacceptable for formal)

results/pruning_ab/mrt_rescue/provenance.MISMATCH: recorded shim (frozen) != actual generator shim ae352c2e (post-live-fix)

known_protocol_mismatches: PRIOR PILOT: per-call (not single-shot) randomization -> carryover
PRIOR PILOT: whole-history line_level_dedup (not segment-local) -> prefix mutation
PRIOR PILOT: offline annotation / online event misalignment
PRIOR PILOT: task-total (not H=1 proximal) estimand
RESCUE: synthetic empty-assistant fallback on malformed upstream (changes trajectory) -> UNACCEPTABLE for formal
RESCUE: in-memory task state (not restart-safe) -> UNACCEPTABLE for formal
RESCUE: eligibility required dup_frac>0.40 -> too restrictive for moderator estimation (formal drops to dup_lines>=5 base availability)
RESCUE: SHA-256 coin-flip (not stratified permuted-block) -> no arm-balance guarantee (N=2 both landed treatment)
PROVENANCE: provenance.json shim sha (12f631e6) != generator sha (ae352c2e)
sample_count_inconsistencies: prior pilot n=7 LINEDEDUP / n=21 NO_OP (per-call) vs rescue N=2 (single-shot, both treatment, 0 control)
prior pilot ATE reported as task-total tokens (-81k), rescue reports H=1 effective cost (3882.6, 5282.1) — DIFFERENT estimands, not comparable

scientific_status_before_formal.mechanism_cache_preservation: SUPPORTED (rescue smoke: cache_read:create 122x/14x vs HYBRID1 recency 0.37x; task-level cache tax SUPPORTED)
scientific_status_before_formal.redundancy_causal_moderator: NOT ESTIMATED formally (prior pilot direction only, protocol-invalid; underpowered)
